name: SaaS MVP
description: Standard SaaS product: authentication, billing, dashboard, API, landing page, and onboarding.

prds.title: Core Product
prds.description: Core SaaS product features: authentication, user management, and main dashboard.

use_cases.name: User Authentication
use_cases.description: Email/password signup, login, password reset, session management.

use_cases.name: User Dashboard
use_cases.description: Main product dashboard showing key metrics, recent activity, and quick actions.

use_cases.name: User Settings
use_cases.description: Account settings: profile, notifications, integrations, billing link.

prds.title: Billing & Subscriptions
prds.description: Stripe-powered billing: subscription plans, checkout, customer portal, webhooks.

use_cases.name: Subscription Checkout
use_cases.description: Stripe Checkout integration for subscription signup with multiple plan tiers.

use_cases.name: Customer Billing Portal
use_cases.description: Stripe Customer Portal for self-service billing management.

use_cases.name: Billing Webhooks
use_cases.description: Handle Stripe webhooks for subscription lifecycle events.

prds.title: API & Integrations
prds.description: REST API for the core product plus third-party integrations.

use_cases.name: Core REST API
use_cases.description: RESTful API with authentication, rate limiting, and standard CRUD operations.
